channel.title: Violoncello on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Violoncello on Tech Tracker

item.title: Violoncello - A text only browser to get vibes of web 1.0 era.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-hd4hy8RtdU0/Y5oDt4SKpeI/AAAAAAAAPvo/fXUhAbl92LIvB710fMh61Y8OZ6jLmQKGACNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1671037874464194-0.png" alt=""> Browser, the one that you’re using now is basically digital software created using number of programming languages like C, Java etc which is specifically designed and developed to crawl Internet right? the world’s first browser named world wide web was created and released by inventor Tim Berners Lee back in year 1991 which access public contents hosted on internet using URL aka uniform resource locator also known as links simply on the go.
